name: ariesclark
description: Aries Clark's Claude Code skills catalog.

plugins.name: elixir-phoenix
plugins.description: Idiomatic Elixir & Phoenix skills — conventions, error handling, Ecto, OTP, Oban, JSON APIs, authorization, security, observability, deployment, and testing.

plugins.name: fly
plugins.description: Operate Fly.io infrastructure — hosted Prometheus & VictoriaLogs queries, SSH into live machines, and production database access.

plugins.name: prior-art
plugins.description: Search for and mirror existing prior art — official/upstream repos, reusable actions, in-repo patterns — before hand-rolling CI, tooling, infra, or reimplementing functionality.
